_comment: Transformers-style knock-off, OPEN/BRIGHT/high-motion recipe. Original VANGUARD robots vs VYPEX legion, no trademarked names. Render: python -m comfymovies --scene-file prompts/disguised_robots.json --duration 60 --res 480p --quality --seed 4242
title: DISGUISED ROBOTS

scenes.prompt: 1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines, saturated colors: on a wide open sunlit highway, trucks and a sports car race forward then transform mid-drive into towering heroic VANGUARD robots with glowing blue visors and chrome armor, panels and gears spinning, dynamic fast camera, bright sky

1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines: the evil VYPEX robots swoop down from a clear sky, transforming from jets in mid-air, red eyes glowing, blasting energy weapons as they land in an open plaza, fast dynamic motion, bright daylight

1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines: an epic open-arena robot battle, the blue VANGUARD leader and the red-eyed VYPEX warlord charge and clash with energy swords and laser blasts, sparks flying, robots dodging and striking fast, wide dynamic camera

1980s cartoon cel animation, bold outlines: triumphant sunrise over an open city square, the heroic VANGUARD robots stride forward victorious as cheering citizens wave, the defeated VYPEX blasting off into the bright sky, sweeping heroic camera
